title: Inventory and export external Cabinet app data
goal: Inventory the live external Cabinet runtime and export any non-versioned data before app decoupling, shutdown or repository rename.

approval.note: This stage authorizes only reviewed Cabinet repository changes implementing a bounded tmpfs-to-Restic handoff and restore verifier. Running the private export remains separately unauthorized.

acceptance.assertion: Service, version, ports, data roots, configuration roots and dependent shortcuts are inventoried without exposing secrets or private runtime details in the public repository.
Non-versioned conversations, notes, memories or configuration that require preservation are exported or explicitly classified as disposable.
The private export has a path, timestamp, file inventory and hashes, while the public receipt is redacted.
Known local and remote consumers are classified before shutdown authority is requested.

metadata.source_decision: Cabinet is to become an app-independent Heimgewebe system catalog.

scope: implement and test a generic tmpfs-to-Restic encrypted handoff and isolated restore verifier in heimgewebe/cabinet
no private export execution, no Restic snapshot creation, no forget/prune, no service mutation and no runtime cleanup

authorized_effects: create an isolated Cabinet worktree and implement generic Restic handoff tooling
add deterministic tests and documentation without private runtime evidence
publish and review a Cabinet pull request bound to this task
pending_effects: run the export tool against private data
create or remove a real tmpfs staging tree
forget or prune any Restic snapshot
service stop, restart, disable or configuration change
publication of concrete paths, host, unit, port, listener, journal, secret, manifest or private app contents

preservation_classes: live SQLite data with write-ahead-log activity
repository-local private workspace and agent state
inventory_evidence.public_evidence_policy: Only classification, extent buckets, backup status and coverage gaps may be published.

export_design.destination_policy: explicit absolute create-only destination outside every repository with owner-only permissions
export_design.database_policy: use SQLite online backup while the service remains running; never copy a live WAL database as ordinary files
export_design.file_policy: copy only identified private configuration and state classes; detect source drift and do not follow unsafe symlinks
export_design.manifest_policy: private JSON manifest with relative archive paths, modes, sizes and SHA-256; public receipt contains aggregates only
export_design.restore_policy: restore into an isolated temporary root, verify manifest hashes and database integrity, and never overwrite live paths
export_design.excluded_from_export: reinstallable multi-GiB application payload except narrowly matched private state artifacts

tool_execution_binding.tool_policy: execute from a clean detached worktree at the exact merge commit

private_destination_commitments.source_of_exact_paths: private local execution packet outside repositories
private_destination_commitments.verification_result: requested encrypted-at-rest destination class not satisfied
private_destination_commitments.requested_destination_class: owner-only create-only destinations with verified encrypted-at-rest coverage outside repositories and source roots

authorization_revocation.reason: exact destination preflight found no encrypted-at-rest coverage for the committed persistent archive paths

restic_handoff_design.repository_class: existing encrypted remote Restic repository reachable through an authenticated local tunnel
restic_handoff_design.staging_class: owner-only tmpfs with sufficient capacity; encrypted swap present
workflow: create bounded Cabinet archive only in a fresh tmpfs directory
verify manifest, payload hashes, permissions and SQLite integrity before upload
create one tagged Restic snapshot without retention mutation
restore the exact snapshot into a second fresh tmpfs directory
verify the restored archive with the Cabinet verifier
emit only a redacted public receipt and remove tmpfs staging under a separately authorized execution
forbidden_commands: generic backup wrapper scripts without argument validation
restic_handoff_design.tooling_requirement: The handoff must expose explicit plan and execute modes; unknown arguments and --help must never execute work.

operator_incident.cause: Two unversioned local backup scripts do not implement --help and treated the probe invocation as a normal run.
operator_incident.cabinet_relevance: The remote snapshot contains the Cabinet repository and active database, but ordinary capture of a live WAL database is not accepted as a valid T012 export.
operator_incident.public_evidence_policy: No repository URL, credential, exact path, private manifest or app content is published.
